message:
Enhance feature beads with logging requirements and E2E test scripts

Updated all 15 feature beads to include:
- Explicit logging requirements with level guidelines (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN)
- E2E test scripts with specific commands and assertions
- More comprehensive acceptance criteria

Updated beads:
- bd-3m7u: Headless Rendering Mode for CI Testing
- bd-17ed: Input Macro Recording and Playback
- bd-17nn: Widget Introspection Debug Overlay
- bd-28jm: Smart Resize Debouncing with Placeholder
- bd-3dca: Session Recording to Asciicast Format
- bd-9xbn: Layout Constraint Debugger
- bd-3tiz: Composable Animation Primitives
- bd-2d2v: Cross-Terminal Clipboard Abstraction
- bd-em01: Performance Tracing with Span Support
- bd-6qxh: Frame Caching with Smart Invalidation

Each feature now follows the comprehensive pattern established by
bd-1iqn (Render Budget) and bd-1euu (Widget Error Boundaries).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
